extra.reason: Stage 1 feature-complete: model evolution (Use sum + ClauseSlotUse), parser change (mineClauseSlotParameter for SKIP+LIMIT bare $p), TCK corpus widening (return-skip-limit/ + 18-entry skiplist + TestSkiplistOrphans), Layer-2 rule update (directional rule + AUTHORED pin for non-bare $p in SKIP/LIMIT), documentation bundle (Stage 1 spec + CONTEXT.md Use entry + Stage 0 §4 C2 note). All five cycles approved by both gated-swarm reviewers (Linus + Metz). just test green at 509/315/0/194.

Stage 2 complete: nullable bindings, listener accepts OPTIONAL MATCH, Layer-2 + goldens updated. Spec doc at docs/specs/cypher-query-parser-stage-2.md. Stack: stage-2-prep → stage-2-model → stage-2-unlock → stage-2-docs. just test green, godog 329/0/180.

Stage 3 landed on branch stage-3-projections. Model commit f053af8 (Projection sealed sum + AggregateFunc + Query.ReturnsAll, Linus gate PASS, pure refactor). Unlock commit (this): listener classifies var/var.prop/scalar-literal/func/aggregate + count(*) + RETURN *->ReturnsAll; 3 skiplist entries (NoVariablesInScope/UnknownFunction/ColumnNameConflict); +2 mustParse, -1 return-star mustReject, +1 authored residual; errors docstring trimmed; 10 new goldens; CONTEXT.md Projection/Aggregate + ADR 0003 note. TDD red->green, Linus gate PASS. godog 329/180 -> 336/173 (+7 passed, -7 pending). just test green. Follow-ups filed: gqlc-gyw (resolver grouping), gqlc-zir (unary-minus nit).

Stage 4 done: WITH chaining + UNION. Restructured query.Query into Branches(UNION)->Parts(WITH) with UnionKind enum; per-part scope threading (exported names L-to-R, WITH * transitive, cross-branch isolation); parameters stay query-wide. godog read-core 371 passed / 179 pending (was 336/173 at Stage 3 end; +35 scenarios parse, clauses/with+clauses/union added to readCoreDirs). 7 WITH/UNION negatives skiplisted (all verified below the type-interface boundary by adversarial review). Linus gate APPROVED. Commits 4491fb8(model)+b6cd944(unlock)+5821e4c(prep) pushed to origin/stage-4-with-union. NO PR per loop discipline.

Stage 5 complete: undirected relationship patterns (a)-[r]-(b) and (a)<-[r]->(b) now parse. EdgeBinding gains a positive 'directed' marker (field+Directed() accessor+trailing constructor param+always-emitted JSON key); listener uses an inverted zero-value-safe 'undirected' raw field, polarity flip at toBinding. collectEdge stops rejecting left==right; directed edges canonicalise, undirected keep textual order (no flip; <--> guarded). godog read-core 371/179 -> 380/170 (+9 passed). Linus gate APPROVED. Branch stage-5-undirected pushed to origin (commits dae7fb3 prep, b474fbe model, d4fbedd unlock). Not N/A: parser is schema-agnostic, marker is load-bearing (undirected yields no single EdgeKey, resolver forms two candidate keys).
